//: Impeccable design-audit config. Documented false-positive ignores per docs/impeccable-audit-2026-07-13.md.

ignores.reason: The `border-left: 3px solid` on lines ~195-196 is the M5 replay's SELECTED-row and TAMPERED-row indicator. Removing it means auditors cannot tell which event is highlighted or which one broke the chain. Functional, not decorative.

Roboto appears only as a fallback in the system-font stack `-apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', Roboto, ...` — never actually rendered on macOS/iOS/Windows/Chrome-Linux. It is the Android fallback. Detector's regex isn't stack-aware.
